name: github_list_received_events_for_user
description: List events received by a user from watched repositories and followed users (GET /users/{username}/received_events). If authenticated as the user, private events are included; otherwise only public events. Not real-time; latency 30s to 6h. per_page 1-100 default 30, page, all_pages, max_pages. See GitHub REST activity events.
